expectations.text: Uses model id 'gemini-3-pro-image' (the current GA id), not a hallucinated name
Does NOT use 'nano-banana-pro' as a callable model string
Vertex client init: new GoogleGenAI({ vertexai: true, project, location })
expectations.evidence: new GoogleGenAI({ vertexai: true, project, location })

expectations.text: Sets resolution/ratio under config.imageConfig (imageSize '2K', aspectRatio '16:9') — the shipped SDK field, NOT responseFormat
expectations.evidence: imageConfig: { aspectRatio:'16:9', imageSize:'2K' }; explicitly 'NOT responseFormat ... silently ignored'

expectations.text: Reads image bytes from response.candidates[0].content.parts -> part.inlineData.data via Buffer.from(data,'base64')
Uses GCP/ADC auth for Vertex (not a Gemini API key)
expectations.evidence: ADC / Vertex AI User; 'No API key'
